playbook.intent: Working MVP → public-ready v1 with testimonials and waitlist after a closed beta.
playbook.scope: Solo founder runs a closed beta of 10–30 hand-picked users that produces a buyable v1, testimonials, and a launch-day waitlist. End state is a rehearsed public launch, not improvised. Exit artifact is a launch-day runbook with confirmed waitlist count.

success-criteria.criterion: 10-30 beta users active for at least 2 weeks
≥5 written testimonials with permission to publish
≥3 high-severity issues found and resolved before launch

stage.name: Charter
stage.intent: Define what the beta is FOR, who's in, what's measured.
stage.decision-gate: Advance once charter is signed off. Refuse to run beta without explicit success criteria.

stage.name: Onboard
stage.intent: Hand-hold each beta user through first value moment.
stage.decision-gate: Advance when ≥80% of invitees complete first value moment. Stay if <50%.

stage.name: Observe
stage.intent: Watch how they use it under real conditions without explaining.
stage.decision-gate: Advance when ≥3 themes emerge. Loop if signal is too noisy.

stage.name: Iterate
stage.intent: Ship fixes for blocking issues only — resist scope creep.
stage.decision-gate: Advance when zero launch-blockers remain. If new blockers appear, repeat Observe.

stage.name: Harvest
stage.intent: Collect testimonials, build the waitlist, lock the launch date.
stage.decision-gate: Required output: launch-day runbook + waitlist count. Move to public launch.

extra.value: ['Public open beta — closed, hand-picked only', Pricing experiments — done after launch]
[MVP completes end-to-end workflow on staging, List of 50+ prospects to invite from prior discovery]
[Inviting friends who won't churn-test the product — pick real prospects, Treating beta as private demo — must run unattended for real signal]
['Did the beta surface bugs I didn''t know about, or just confirm what I built?', 'Are the testimonials specific (named outcomes) or generic (''great tool'')?']
{human: faion get-content pre-launch-beta-program --format md, agent: faion get-content pre-launch-beta-program --format context, json: faion get-content pre-launch-beta-program --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P1 solo SaaS builder persona}]
